history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man in a black t-shirt and shorts is sitting on a dark blue scooter, talking on his phone, with his right hand holding the phone to his ear. He's wearing white slide sandals with a star logo. A large cardboard box is strapped to the front of the scooter. The scooter is parked on a paved road, with a shadow cast by the scooter and the box. In the background, there's a building with a white corrugated metal roof and a red tiled roof visible behind it. A sign on the building reads "JUICE DAN ES KELAPA MUDA" (Juice and Young Coconut Ice). There are also power lines and a utility pole in the sky. The sky is bright blue with scattered white clouds. The overall lighting suggests a sunny day. The style is realistic, capturing a candid street scene. The color palette is dominated by the blue of the scooter and sky, the brown of the box, and the neutral tones of the building and road. The mood is casual and everyday, with a slight sense of urgency implied by the man talking on the phone while on his scooter.
